title: SOTA + LoRA TTT: 10L Int5/Int6 + test-time training
body:
## Summary

- Combines current SOTA training (10L mixed int5/int6 quantization, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, Muon+SWA) with per-document LoRA test-time training at evaluation
- LoRA rank-8 adapters on Q/V projections and LM head, reset between documents
- Exploits unused eval budget (~445s of 600s) for per-document adaptation

## Preliminary Results (1xH200, no wallclock cap)

- Quantized SWA model sliding window eval: **~1.130 BPB** (running average at 24% eval)
- Current SOTA: 1.1428 BPB

## Status

- [x] Training script complete
- [x] Full training run on 1xH200
- [ ] 8xH100 validation (10-min constraint)
- [ ] 3-seed statistical significance
- [ ] Final submission.json with verified results

## Key Techniques

1. **Mixed Int5/Int6 Quantization** — Int5 for MLP, Int6 for attention, FP16 for embeddings
2. **BigramHash(10240)** — 10240-bucket bigram embedding table
3. **SmearGate + OrthoInit + U-Net skips**
4. **Muon optimizer** WD=0.04, SWA start_frac=0.4
5. **LoRA TTT at eval** — per-document adaptation with rank-8 LoRA on Q, V, LM head

## Test Plan

- [ ] Validate training completes in <10min on 8xH100 SXM
- [ ] Validate eval completes in <10min on 8xH100 SXM
- [ ] Verify artifact size <16,000,000 bytes
- [ ] Run 3+ seeds, report mean/std, demonstrate p<0.01 vs SOTA
